result.summary: C3 complete: Created ShapeBoundary.ts with ShapeType, BoundaryMode, ShapeConfig types plus isInsideShape (oval/triangle/rectangle/none with barycentric triangle test and SDF rounded-box), distortCoordinates (polar warp with optional LUT), and defaultShapeConfig. DistortionLUT.ts provides buildLUT (720-entry Float32Array at 0.5° resolution) and lookupLUT (linear interpolation). All pure and worker-safe. 20 boundary tests pass. Integration into shared files deferred to C5.
